title: Product Description for Millennial
scenario: Create a product description for a sustainable water bottle designed for millennials. The description should be 150-200 words long, include a call-to-action with the hashtag #sustainableliving, and use a trendy tone.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check that the product description has a trendy tone suitable for millennials.
Check that the description is within the 150-200 word limit and includes a call-to-action with #sustainableliving.
Check that the description is consistent with the voice and tone of a product designed for millennials.
